---
title: "Predictive Modeling"
---

## Overview

This section will cover machine learning methods applied to the Lightcast job postings data, focusing on clustering and classification techniques to uncover patterns in hiring.

## Planned Methods

| Method | Goal |
|--------|------|
| K-Means Clustering | Group job postings by salary, industry, and education requirements |
| Logistic Regression | Predict employment type (full-time vs. part-time) |
| Random Forest | Identify top features driving salary range |

## Status

> Coming in Phase 4. ETL and EDA must be finalized first.
